title: Cinematic Portrait Template 077
desc: Reusable cinematic portrait prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a clean and modern tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic portrait image of a gourmet plated dish in a modern studio. Use macro close-up framing, soft window light, and pastel pink and sky blue color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a clean and modern emotional tone.
